name: Marble Squares Ala Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, margarine and chocolate in a saucepan, bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in the combined flour, sugar, baking soda and salt.
3. Add the two eggs and sour cream; mix well.
4. Pour into a greased and floured 15 X 10 X 1 " jelly roll pan.
5. Combine cream cheese and sugar, mix until well blended.
6. Blend in egg.
7. Spoon over chocolate batter.
8. Cut with a knife through the batter to give a marbled effect.
9. Sprinkle with chocolate morsels.
10. Bake at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
